positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical cosmic botanical map illustration. Intricate, glowing constellations form pathways that connect stylized silhouettes of ancient flora, exotic mushrooms, and stylized leaves. The composition must be perfectly centered and designed for a repeating surface pattern. The style fuses Art Deco line work with ethereal bioluminescent natural elements. Use high contrast, featuring deep midnight indigo and sapphire blue backgrounds punctuated by glowing teal and metallic gold lines. Clean vector look, strong silhouettes, symmetrical balance, suitable for apparel textile print.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, signature, artifacts, noise, deformed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grain, low detail, photorealistic, realistic people, messy composition
